label: Transparent bowerbird display motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent catalog motif cutout, generated first on removable chroma-key background
Primary request: A refined bowerbird display motif for a Morphous design-system catalog, centered and isolated.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Subject: a satin bowerbird display arrangement: one elegant brown-feathered bowerbird with subtle dark wings beside a small curated bower of forest twigs, carefully arranged vivid blue found objects, and a few fresh green Australian forest leaves.
Style: polished natural-history editorial illustration with tactile feather detail, clean silhouette, high-end design catalog asset, realistic materials but slightly stylized for UI theming.
Composition: full subject visible, generous padding, crisp edges, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Color constraints: blue objects, brown feathers, green foliage; do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Avoid: text, watermark, frame, cropped body, extra birds, photorealistic background, messy clutter.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: full Morphous design-system board, light mode, 16:9 high-resolution source artwork
Primary request: Create a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Bowerbird", a curated collection system inspired by a satin bowerbird display in an Australian forest.
Motif direction: brown feather texture, carefully arranged vivid blue found objects, twig bower structure, fresh green forest leaves, quiet Australian forest context.
Palette: warm feather brown, bark umber, object cobalt blue, pale sky blue, eucalyptus green, leaf deep green, parchment background, ink charcoal.
System feel: curated collection system: organized, selective, naturalist, precise, gallery-like, useful for cataloging treasured objects.
Layout: one polished 16:9 board with large readable sections, not a website landing page. Include: motif preview, color palette swatches with names and hex-like labels, typography guidance for English and Japanese, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table, command/search, navigation/sidebar, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture samples, icon style, and sample collection UI usage.
Visual style: modern shadcn-compatible UI board, crisp labels, restrained density, clean grid, light parchment surface, brown/green neutrals, vivid blue accents used deliberately like curated display objects.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid paragraphs and tiny token tables.
Avoid: purple gradients, generic SaaS blue-only palette, stock photos, illegible microtext, dark mode, ornamental clutter, watermark.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: full Morphous design-system board, dark mode, 16:9 high-resolution source artwork
Primary request: Create a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Bowerbird", matching the same light-mode Bowerbird system but translated to dark UI surfaces.
Motif direction: satin bowerbird display in an Australian forest: brown feathers, twig bower, vivid curated blue objects, eucalyptus and deep green leaves.
Palette: charcoal forest background, deep bark brown, warm feather tan, electric object cobalt, muted sky blue, eucalyptus green, moss green, bone text, amber warning.
System feel: curated collection system: organized, selective, naturalist, precise, gallery-like, useful for cataloging treasured objects.
Layout: one polished 16:9 board with large readable sections. Include: motif preview, color palette swatches with names and hex-like labels, typography guidance for English and Japanese, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table, command/search, navigation/sidebar, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture samples, icon style, and sample collection UI usage.
Visual style: modern shadcn-compatible UI board, crisp labels, restrained density, clean grid, dark forest surfaces with brown/green neutrals and vivid blue accents like selected display objects.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid paragraphs and tiny token tables.
Avoid: purple gradients, generic neon cyber UI, light mode, stock photos, illegible microtext, ornamental clutter, watermark.
